ontology_metadata.description: Core ontology defining fundamental classes and relations for numerical analysis knowledge graph.

MathematicalObject.description: Base abstract class for all mathematical entities.

NumericalMethod.description: Algorithmic procedure used to approximate mathematical problems.

ProblemType.description: Formal mathematical problem class such as ODE, PDE, linear system.

TheoreticalProperty.description: Analytical property such as stability, convergence, consistency.

ErrorConcept.description: Quantified deviation between exact and approximate solutions.

MathematicalStructure.description: Abstract mathematical structure such as matrix, operator, function space.

ComputationalStructure.description: Discretization-related object such as mesh, grid, basis function.

is_instance_of.description: Indicates that an entity is an instance of a class.

applies_to.description: Indicates which problem type a method applies to.

solves.description: Indicates that a method solves a specific problem type.

has_property.description: Indicates analytical property of a method.

has_error_analysis.description: A method has a formally defined error measure.

quantifies.description: An error concept quantifies the deviation of a method.

uses.description: Indicates mathematical objects used within a method.

approximates.description: A numerical method approximates a mathematical object (function, operator, derivative). Source is always the NumericalMethod, target is always the MathematicalObject being approximated.

defined_by.description: Links concept to its formal definition.
